body.style: margin:0; padding:0; height:100vh; background:#18181b; font-family:'Press Start 2P', system-ui; color:white;

input.style: width:100%; padding:25px; font-size:22px; background:#27272a; border:4px solid #FFCC00; border-radius:9999px; color:white; outline:none;

button.style: margin-top:15px; width:100%; padding:20px; font-size:24px; background:#FFCC00; color:black; border:none; border-radius:9999px; font-weight:bold;
padding:30px 60px; font-size:28px; background:#FFCC00; color:black; border:none; border-radius:20px; font-weight:bold;

div.style: display:none; position:fixed; top:0; left:0; width:100%; height:100%; background:#000; z-index:999;

button.style: padding:10px 20px; background:red; color:white; border:none; border-radius:8px; font-size:18px;
